# azion-api models that MUST keep `decoder.DisallowUnknownFields()`.
#
# These are every schema that takes part in a `oneOf` in azion-api.yaml
# (the oneOf containers and their variant members) plus utils.go, which hosts
# newStrictDecoder used by the containers. oneOf disambiguation relies on strict
# decoding to reject a payload that belongs to a sibling variant; without it,
# e.g. {"type":"set_connector","attributes":{...}} matches both BehaviorArgs and
# BehaviorNoArgs and unmarshaling fails with
# "data matches more than one schema in oneOf(RequestPhaseBehavior)".
#
# Every OTHER model has DisallowUnknownFields stripped after generation so new
# API fields don't break the SDK. Computed once from azion-api.yaml; regenerate
# this list if the spec's oneOf set changes. Lines starting with # are ignored.
model_account.go
model_account_request.go
model_aws_kinesis_firehose_endpoint.go
model_aws_kinesis_firehose_endpoint_request.go
model_azure_blob_storage_endpoint.go
model_azure_blob_storage_endpoint_request.go
model_azure_monitor_endpoint.go
model_azure_monitor_endpoint_request.go
model_behavior_args.go
model_behavior_capture.go
model_behavior_no_args.go
model_big_query_endpoint.go
model_big_query_endpoint_request.go
model_brand.go
model_brand_request.go
model_connector.go
model_connector_http.go
model_connector_http_request.go
model_connector_live_ingest.go
model_connector_live_ingest_request.go
model_connector_request.go
model_connector_storage.go
model_connector_storage_request.go
model_create_account_request.go
model_create_brand_request.go
model_create_organization_request.go
model_create_reseller_request.go
model_create_workspace_request.go
model_datadog_endpoint.go
model_datadog_endpoint_request.go
model_deployment_strategy_default_deployment_strategy.go
model_deployment_strategy_default_deployment_strategy_request.go

model_elasticsearch_endpoint_request.go

model_firewall_behavior_no_args_request.go

model_firewall_behavior_object_args_request.go

model_firewall_behavior_set_custom_response_attributes_request.go
model_firewall_behavior_set_rate_limit_attributes.go
model_firewall_behavior_set_rate_limit_attributes_request.go
model_firewall_behavior_set_waf_attributes.go
model_firewall_behavior_set_waf_attributes_request.go
model_http_post_endpoint.go
model_http_post_endpoint_request.go
model_input_input_data_source_attributes.go
model_input_input_data_source_attributes_request.go
model_kafka_endpoint.go
model_kafka_endpoint_request.go
model_login_response.go
model_mfa_token.go
model_organization.go
model_organization_request.go

model_output_request.go
model_page.go
model_page_connector.go
model_page_connector_request.go
model_page_request.go
model_patched_account_request.go
model_patched_brand_request.go
model_patched_connector_http_request.go
model_patched_connector_live_ingest_request.go
model_patched_connector_request.go
model_patched_connector_storage_request.go
model_patched_organization_request.go
model_patched_reseller_request.go
model_patched_workspace_request.go
model_q_radar_endpoint.go
model_q_radar_endpoint_request.go
model_request_phase_behavior.go
model_request_phase_behavior_request.go
model_reseller.go
model_reseller_request.go

model_response_phase_behavior.go
model_response_phase_behavior_request.go
